name: Boston Chicken Squash
recipeIngredient: Pat dwigans (2 Butternut squash), halved and seeds removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Place squash cut-side down on a Pam-sprayed shallow baking pan.
3. Bake uncovered for about 45 minutes, or until fork tender.
4. Wipe the cut surface with a little butter and sprinkle with salt.
5. Return to bake cut-side up for about 10 minutes longer, or until browned and soft.
6. Scrape out the meat into a mixing bowl.
7. Add sugar, honey, ginger, pumpkin pie spice, and butter to the bowl.
8. Beat with an electric mixer at medium speed until smooth.
9. Return mixture to oven, covered in foil, for 30 minutes to keep warm until serving time.
10. Refrigerate leftovers for about a week or freeze up to 4 months.
